Current Active Role:
Sales Representative
Permitted Operations:
  • Create new mattress orders manually
  • Download standard Excel template
  • Upload orders via CSV spreadsheet
  • Track status of submitted orders

*Use the dropdown in the top-right menu bar to switch between Sales, Manager, and Accounts roles to experience the full ERP flow.

Purpes Mattress Catalog & Price Engine

Standard size prices are adjusted by size multipliers. Custom dimensions are priced dynamically per cubic inch + 10% premium.

Mattress Model Firmness Core materials Cover Fabric Base Price (Single)
